rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow the user to select their role.
The system shall enable the user to sign in after choosing a role.
The system shall allow the signed-in user to submit a startup idea.
The system shall review the submitted startup idea.
The system shall provide mentorship based on the review result.
The system shall make an investment decision if the startup idea is presented to an investor.
The system shall provide funding based on the investment decision.
The system shall end the process once all actions are completed.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows a user to choose their role (investor, entrepreneur, or mentor).
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A person starts by choosing their role, such as investor, entrepreneur, or mentor.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system enables the user to sign in after selecting their role.
The system allows a startup idea to be submitted by the signed-in user.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After signing in, a startup idea is submitted and reviewed.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system reviews the submitted startup idea.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A decision is then made on that idea.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Based on the review, the user may receive mentorship.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The person may move forward with mentorship

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the startup idea is presented to an investor, the system makes an investment decision.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: or the idea may be presented to an investor. If it is presented, an investment decision is made,

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system provides funding based on the investment decision.
The process ends once all actions are completed.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once everything is done, the process comes to an end.
